ip_outcome_note: Card is named 'Cid Highwind,' job is Pilot (FFVII), art is attributed to Tetsuya Nomura's original character design. The depicted figure's goggles-on-forehead, cigarette, tool harness, and spiky light hair are Cid Highwind's signature visual identifiers per Final Fantasy Wiki. IP is Wizards-internal equivalent (Square Enix-original character); no external crossover risk. ip_verified set to true.

trivia_bullets.text: Opus VIII (released March 2019) was the first FFTCG set to introduce Final Fantasy XIV: Stormblood content alongside FFVII, FFXV, and Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles, making it one of the most cross-franchise sets in the game's early run [Square Enix FFTCG Opus VIII release page].
sources: Square Enix FFTCG Opus VIII release page (fftcg.square-enix-games.com/na/release/opus-viii)

trivia_bullets.text: Cid Highwind is a 5-cost, 7000-power Wind Forward with the Pilot job. His Enter-the-Field ability bounces any opponent Backup of cost 3 or more back to hand; his Big Brawl (S) ability — activated by dulling — bounces any opponent Character. In multiples, Big Brawl creates large resource swings, though community notes the targets are often cards opponents are happy to replay [fftcgcrystarium.com Opus VIII limited review; TCGplayer Opus VIII listings].
sources: TCGplayer Opus VIII Cid Highwind listing

trivia_bullets.text: Cid Highwind's card art reproduces Tetsuya Nomura's original FFVII character design: spiky light hair, goggles pushed to forehead, cigarette in mouth, white sleeveless shirt, and tool harness — a set of signature visual identifiers that appear consistently across all of Cid's FFTCG and Dissidia appearances [Final Fantasy Wiki: Cid Highwind/Other appearances].
sources: Final Fantasy Wiki: Cid Highwind/Other appearances (finalfantasy.fandom.com)

trivia_bullets.text: Within FFVII canon, Cid is a former Shinra engineer and rocket scientist who sacrificed his space dream to save engineer Shera's life when Shinra's No. 26 rocket launch would have killed her. His hand-made starting spear makes him the only FFVII party member confirmed to forge his own weapons [Final Fantasy Wiki: Cid Highwind].
